# Cross-Topic Relationships

agent-architecture ↔ middleware-as-organ: Agent execution model depends on middleware infrastructure organizing cross-cycle state

constraint-theory ↔ isc: Constraint Texture (ISC) operationalizes abstract constraint theory into cognitive/interface design

commitment-closure-mechanism ↔ verification-discipline: Commitment tracking requires outcome verification to prevent ghost closures

kg-write-timing-policy ↔ memory-internalize: Knowledge graph triggers digestion; internalization compiles reasoning into searchable form

fragile-constraints ↔ interface-shapes-cognition: Friction at interface level crystallizes as load-bearing constraints in cognition

teaching-monster ↔ prediction-calibration: Competition data provides empirical calibration for forecasting models

design_dag_enforcement ↔ mini-agent-proposal-v2-final: DAG-based task design is core architectural proposal for executable plans

memory-architecture ↔ context-optimization: Memory layering (truth/views) enables efficient context reuse across cycles

heartbeat-pollution-diagnosis ↔ classifier-gap-chinese-fallback: Signal quality and classification accuracy affect system observability

devto-engagement ↔ community-bottleneck-reframe: Community participation model shifts from broadcast to relationship-driven discovery
